case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY vs. DRONSKY, MARINA et al

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-21-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-21-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. NO APPEARANCE AND OR GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-05-1996 CONTINUED FROM AUG-21-1996 TO SEP-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
